evals.name: duplicate-form-validation
evals.prompt: Add duplicate-name validation to a Django form and make sure invalid submissions do not save anything.
evals.expected_output: Places tests at form/model/view layers as needed, checks invalid-save prevention, and explains constraint versus form responsibility.

evals.name: model-form-refactor
evals.prompt: Refactor this Django view to use a ModelForm, but I am worried about coupling the HTML field names to the database.
evals.expected_output: Characterizes current behavior, adds form tests, discusses ModelForm tradeoffs, and keeps view/template wiring coverage.
